title: Crystal Damage Modifier
description: Damage modifier for end crystals and respawn anchors
body:
## Crystal Damage Modifier
A simple plugin that allows you to scale the explosion damage of End Crystals and Respawn Anchors, either increasing or decreasing it using a configurable multiplier.

### Rationale
Originally created for an SMP server to reduce End Crystal damage, which was considered overpowered in PvP scenarios. This plugin provides a simple way to balance gameplay by adjusting explosive damage to suit your server's needs.

### Usage

Permission: `crystaldamage.admin`

`/crystaldamage reload` - Reloads the configuration file

`/crystaldamage set <num>` - Sets the damage multiplier for end crystals. E.g., `1.5` = 50% increase, `0.1` = 10% of what it would normally do
